MUT-INT-012.reason: Mutation adds 'premium_discount' field to method_result dict, but SBH's 26 bound fields don't include premium_discount (it's a new field not in the original artifact). Adding an extra field doesn't change any of the 26 compared values. In Phase 4G F4G-E, this was caught because SBH compared full method hash — but current SBH compares specific field groups.
MUT-INT-012.remediation: Add premium_discount to SBH bound field groups, OR reclassify as INVALID_ORACLE

MUT-INT-016.reason: BVH clean artifact has errors=[] (empty). Mutation 'c.update({"errors": []})' is a no-op — errors already empty. BVH Phase 5R run produced no CRITICAL errors (PRICE_DATE_UNRESOLVED is MAJOR, not CRITICAL). Context error_state.fatal_error_codes is also empty. No error to remove.
MUT-INT-016.remediation: Use a ticker that actually has CRITICAL errors in clean artifact, OR inject synthetic fatal error first

MUT-INT-025.reason: Mutation changes 'scope' field on a method_result item (m.update({'scope': 'parent_only'})), but method_result items don't have a 'scope' field in the schema. The 'scope' field belongs to input_summary metrics. SBH compares scope_bindings from input_summary, not from method_result. Adding 'scope' to a method_result dict is an invalid mutation target.
MUT-INT-025.remediation: Change mutation to modify input_summary metric scope instead of method_result scope
